---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome to Albee Analytics

![](images/Screenshot_20250109-102200%20(2)-01.jpg){style="margin-bottom: 20px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%;" fig-align="center" width="200"}

Hello 👋, I am **Alexander Mbithi**, a data analyst

specializing in:

*Applied Statistics*

*Data Visualization*

*Time Series Analysis*

*Reporting*

I build data-driven solutions for

real-world problems by transforming raw data

into actionable , high-impact solutions.

## Featured

1.  Youth Unemployment rates in Kenya.

2.  Chick Weights Analysis.
